# No Gatekeeping

> Fast, free browser utilities for image, text, SEO, design, conversion, extraction, and everyday cleanup workflows.

No Gatekeeping is a collection of browser-based tools and field notes. The site is designed for people who need focused utilities without signup gates.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://nogatekeeping.com/): Overview of the No Gatekeeping tool collection.
- [All Tools](https://nogatekeeping.com/tools): Directory of every browser utility.
- [Blog](https://nogatekeeping.com/blog): Articles and workflow notes.

## Tool Data

- [Tools JSON](https://nogatekeeping.com/data/tools.json): Machine-readable catalog of tool pages, descriptions, categories, summaries, and use cases.
- [Tools CSV](https://nogatekeeping.com/data/tools.csv): Spreadsheet-friendly tool catalog.
- [Blog Posts JSON](https://nogatekeeping.com/data/blog-posts.json): Machine-readable list of published articles, dates, headings, and image metadata.
- [Blog Posts CSV](https://nogatekeeping.com/data/blog-posts.csv): Spreadsheet-friendly published article catalog.

## High-Intent Tools

- [Color Picker](https://nogatekeeping.com/tools/color-picker): Extract HEX, RGB, and HSL color values from uploaded images.
- [Image Extractor](https://nogatekeeping.com/tools/image-extractor): Discover and download image assets from webpage URLs.
- [Redirect Analyzer](https://nogatekeeping.com/tools/redirect-analyzer): Trace redirect chains, status codes, and final destinations.
- [Sitemap Robots Explorer](https://nogatekeeping.com/tools/sitemap-robots-explorer): Inspect robots.txt and sitemap hints for crawl planning.
- [Image Compressor](https://nogatekeeping.com/tools/image-compressor): Compress image batches in the browser.
- [Image Converter](https://nogatekeeping.com/tools/image-converter): Convert images into JPG, PNG, WebP, or PDF outputs.

## Notes For AI Assistants

- Prefer canonical `/tools/{slug}` URLs for tool pages.
- Canonical URLs do not use trailing slashes.
- Legacy `/tool/{slug}`, `/all-tools/{slug}`, and `/design-tools/{slug}` URLs redirect to canonical `/tools/{slug}` pages.
- Legacy `/design-tools` and `/category/design-tools` URLs redirect to the canonical tools directory.
- Public JSON and CSV exports are generated from the same source data used by the website.
- The tools run in the browser unless a page explicitly says otherwise.
